description: Usami is a member of S4 or Shooting Star Subaru-Sama. She is shown to have considerable leg power which she uses in the form of kicks. She blackmailed Kinjirou, with the picture of him and Subaru on a mock date, to be her boyfriend up until the end of their school fair. Kinjirou accepted because of the condition that she will not spread the photo with Subaru and Kinjiro going out together. name: Mayoi Katase
description: Along with Sakaki, she makes up the prankster duo in the friendship circle. Very savvy with electronics and almost never seen without her lab-coat. Loves to tease Tsumiki which often brought her severe repercussions from Tsumiki herself. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Motoka Nogisaka
description: __Height:__ 160 cm Motoka is a college student struggling to make ends meet, working as a maid in the Migiwa Household to pay the expenses of tuition. While not ideally suited for household chores, her warm compassion and captivating personality offset these deficiencies. She is best friends with Ifukube Yahiro, a notorious drinker, which makes Motoka’s low tolerance to alcohol a particularly hazardous social issue. Especially since she has a particular fondness for the taste of sake.

name: Nagisa Ran
description: __Units:__ Eden, Adam __Circles:__ BIBLION, Dramatica Having been isolated from society for a long period of time, Nagisa appears to be almost otherworldly. Along with Ibara Saegusa, he works as one half of Adam. Though he may be calm and quiet in disposition, he is very considerate of and passionate about his friends.
